milestones.title: Optimize synthesis speed
milestones.quickPrompt: The synthesis lambda currently averages 23-27s for complex queries. The compact prompt (`SYNTHESIS_PROMPT_COMPACT=1`) is already active but further reduction is needed. Phase 1 shipped (Jun 12): Key Points now display progressively as they stream — `progressiveKeyPoints` state in ChatContainer receives each point via SSE `key_point` events emitted by the reasoning lambda's Haiku fast path. Phase 2 context (Jun 15): query intent classifier routes question types to optimized retrieval strategies (lookup, broad-search, comparative — see `src/lib/query-intent-classifier.ts`); retrieval confidence gate enforces additive-only evidence injection (low-confidence KB results no longer contaminate note context). Model Compare tab shipped (Jun 18): side-by-side Sonnet vs Opus synthesis quality evaluation available in the evidence engine UI — use for regression-testing latency/quality tradeoffs before changing model routing. Phase 2 target: shorten the Sonnet tool-calling phase. Current bottleneck is the two-stage reasoning pipeline (Haiku fast path ~8s, Sonnet standard ~23s, deep ~27s). Consider: (1) reducing KB retrieval k from 20→12 for standard queries, (2) caching frequent query embeddings, (3) parallelizing the tool calls in the Sonnet stage. Key files: `lambda/reasoning/handler.ts`, `src/app/api/query/route.ts`. Metrics: CloudWatch `SynthesisLatencyMs` custom metric. Do not change the Haiku fast-path threshold (currently queries scoring <0.4 on complexity go to Haiku). Do not touch the guardrail config. Jun 23: Riya intent router shipped (PRs #917-925) — AI query router wires Ask box into encounter Tools panel, routes questions by intent type (clinical/drug/general); flag-gated dark by default. Prod fixes: ENCOUNTERS_TABLE pointed to prod (was -dev), router reads full note (not chart-prep summary), drug-interaction → DRUG intent. KB HYBRID-SEMANTIC fallback (PR #921) — retries with SEMANTIC when OpenSearch index rejects HYBRID. See `src/lib/note-intent-router.ts` and `src/lib/evidence-tools.ts`. Jun 25: Ask box now sends live note text in /ask request body (PRs #936-937) — router receives full note for richer intent classification; eval hardening with 5-judge panel + variance bands (PR #927, GPT-5 + Gemini added); flag-gated Suggest Scales in chart prep (PRs #928-929, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUGGESTED_SCALES_ENABLED default OFF); router Codex hardening + IDOR/PHI fixes in feedback route (PRs #926, #930-931); SCALE pipeline routes to Sonnet.

milestones.title: SSO Phase 4 — Passkeys
milestones.quickPrompt: Current auth: Cognito TOTP MFA required (pool us-east-2_9y6XyJnXC). Phase 4 goal: add WebAuthn/passkey as an alternative second factor so users can authenticate with Touch ID or Face ID instead of a TOTP app. Cognito does not natively support passkeys — implementation options: (1) Cognito + Lambda@Edge passkey shim, (2) migrate to Cognito Hosted UI with custom domain and passkey JS, (3) swap auth layer to Auth0/Okta which have native passkey support. Microsoft Entra login shipped in v2.6.8/v2.6.9. Recent Scribe context (Jun 24): Riya intent router shipped (PRs #917-925, Jun 23) — Ask box wired to encounter Tools panel; routes by intent type (clinical/drug/general); flag-gated dark by default. Prod fixes: ENCOUNTERS_TABLE pointed to prod (was -dev), router reads full note (not chart-prep summary), drug-interaction → DRUG intent. KB HYBRID-SEMANTIC fallback (PR #921) — retries with SEMANTIC when OpenSearch index rejects HYBRID. Recent Scribe context (Jun 23): No new code commits since Jun 22. System stable — no new PRs since Jun 18 traffic-light + classifier work (PRs #912, #914-915). All milestones current. Recent Scribe context (Jun 22): No new code commits since Jun 21. System stable — no new PRs since Jun 18 traffic-light + classifier work (PRs #912, #914-915). All milestones current. Recent Scribe context (Jun 21): No new code commits since Jun 20 — system stable since Jun 18 traffic-light + classifier work (PRs #912, #914-915). All milestones current. Recent Scribe context (Jun 18): Traffic-light severity router shipped (PR #912) — green/yellow/red classifier routes Scribe note generation to appropriate model; KB citations now enabled for all severity levels; triage UI live. Classifier refinements (PRs #914-915) — routine epilepsy routes GREEN, acute seizures stay RED; Riya's safety-audit downgrades reconciled. Model Compare tab added (Jun 18) for side-by-side Sonnet vs Opus evidence synthesis quality evaluation. Recent Scribe context (Jun 17): Transcribe no-clobber fix (PR #911) — don't clobber a note-bearing encounter on a FAILED re-record; preserves completed note content when a subsequent recording fails. Recent Scribe context (Jun 16): drop search-term echo from /encounters/recent response (PR #910, prevents echo from appearing as phantom encounter label); email-bridge + drafted notes included in recent list (PR #908); encounter-poll chrome.alarm now survives auth token gaps and extension update/reload events via rearmEncounterPollIfPending (PR #903); physicianEmail backfill Lambda deployed (PR #902). Recent Scribe context (Jun 15): recent encounters search (PRs #908-909, ?q= filter across all-time history by label/room/hospital/id); getDisplayMedia capture-hang timeout fixed (#905); acuity assertion no longer forces URGENT/STAT unless explicitly stated (#907); CI fully green — all test exclusions removed (#898-900); CASE_DISCUSSION_ENABLED exposed to SSR runtime (#897); patient-match soft-warn (PR #893) deployed — standalone consult stranding fixed. Recent Scribe context (Jun 14): note-section-editing flag-gated (VITE_NOTE_SECTION_EDIT_ENABLED, committed OFF in .env.production); grounded feedback-triage Lambda re-landed (PR #874, PHI-safe, staged IAM runbook); branch protection on main enabled (Jun 12, direct pushes still allowed for daily-sync). Recent Scribe context (Jun 13): Patient-identity extractor additive + flag-gated (PATIENT_IDENTITY_EXTRACTION_ENABLED, default OFF); encounter DELETE data-loss fix — server content guard (PR #883, GET before DELETE, 409 has_content guard, DECISIONS D22 codified). Recent Scribe context (Jun 12): note-section-editing (PR #871, flag-gated VITE_NOTE_SECTION_EDIT_ENABLED committed OFF); grounded-triage Lambda re-landed (PR #874); branch protection enabled on main (direct pushes still allowed). Recent Scribe context (Jun 11): CITATION_LABEL_V2 flag-gated (PR #861, -27% weak citations); clientType attribution (PR #862); Key Points progressive display (PR #868); generate caller attribution + eval harness hardening (PRs #869/#870/#872); exam-grounding guard codex-hardened (PR #873). Recent Scribe context (Jun 10): Scribe v2.6.20–v2.6.21 (companion auto-reconnect, combined extension, dual-channel SSR env fix, PRs #855/#857). Recent Scribe context (Jun 9): dual-channel flag-gated (VITE_DUAL_CHANNEL_TRANSCRIPTION); Scribe v2.6.15–v2.6.19 (dead-encounter recovery, preferCurrentTab drop, resilient mic + stereo on getDisplayMedia, stop-guard hardening). Key files: `src/app/api/auth/`, `src/middleware.ts`, Cognito console. Prerequisite: neuro-plans-v2 SSO migration from deprecated pool (us-east-2_Owfb1zpgM → us-east-2_9y6XyJnXC) is non-blocking but eliminates duplicate sign-in when Scale Calculator deep-link opens neuroplans.app. Recent Scribe context (Jun 25): Ask box wired to /ask API with live note text (PRs #936-937); eval 5-judge panel (GPT-5 + Gemini, PR #927); Suggest Scales chart-prep flag (PRs #928-929, OFF by default); router Codex hardening + feedback IDOR/PHI fix (PRs #926, #930-931). System stable on main.

milestones.title: SDNE clinical threshold tuning
milestones.quickPrompt: SENSE-Vestibular planning docs + v0.5 science-audit decisions shipped (PR #66, Jun 17): added planning documentation and v0.5 science-audit decision records for the SENSE-Vestibular module; vestibular exam domain architecture and clinical validation decisions captured in docs/. SDNE passive-findings repeatability harness shipped (PR #55, Jun 9): per-task passive-findings collection with real wrist-overlay from diagnostics and a calibration harness for threshold work. T00 eye calibration now surfaces real gaze divergence (stopped emitting fake 0.95 quality); T16 TUG trunk-yaw sway gains a physiologic sanity floor (extreme values → INVALID). Upload session hardening complete (PRs #57–62, Jun 10–11): soundex-based phonetic name key prevents ASR consonant-noise splits from creating duplicate patients; MRN upsert conflict fixed; acoustic queue watchdog prevents stalls. Current acoustic thresholds (Parkinsonian tremor, spasmodic-dysphonia, dysarthria) are provisional — calibrated on synthetic/literature values. Phase 5 acoustic calibration requires real patient recordings. T26 spasmodic-dysphonia task is opt-in pending threshold validation. Key files: `SDNE/Assets/_Project/Scripts/Utilities/Thresholds.cs`, `SDNE/Assets/_Project/Scripts/Core/FlagAggregator.cs`, `docs/SDNE_Core15_Screening_Specification.md`. To start: review current threshold values in Thresholds.cs, compare against literature ranges in the spec, identify which tasks have the most variance in the passive-findings harness output.

milestones.title: Real-time voice streaming
milestones.quickPrompt: Next major feature after triage async+polling (shipped May 2). Goal: replace post-visit batch transcription with real-time streaming during encounters using AWS Transcribe Medical (HIPAA-eligible). Current stack: OpenAI Whisper for transcription (post-stop batch). Target: AWS Transcribe Medical streaming WebSocket during the encounter, so transcript appears live. Key constraint: Amplify gateway timeout ~28s — use the same 202+poll pattern used for triage (see PRs #112-113). Auth: Cognito pool us-east-2_9y6XyJnXC, client 6rahc3cs4846f05gf7fbucqi4d. DB: ops_amplehtml (57 tables). Recent changes (Jun 7): ASR vocabulary biasing shipped across all 5 voice surfaces (PRs #123-125) — new src/lib/asr/clinical-lexicon.ts biases Realtime surfaces via Whisper prompt and Deepgram Nova-3 paths via keyterm array. RDS TLS validation + RDS_DATABASE env override (PRs #120-121). Key files: src/app/api/ai/transcribe/route.ts, src/app/api/ai/visit-ai/route.ts.

milestones.title: Fill remaining 18 diagnosis plans
milestones.quickPrompt: 98 neurology treatment plans are in the DB, covering 148 of 166 diagnoses. 18 diagnoses still lack plans. The plans come from blondarb/neuro-plans and are synced via `npm run sync-plans`. To fill the gap: (1) check which diagnoses are missing by running the sync script with --dry-run, (2) add the missing plans to neuro-plans repo following that repo's pipeline, (3) re-sync. Recent changes (Jun 7): ASR vocab biasing shipped (PRs #123-125), RDS TLS validation (PRs #120-121). Auth: Cognito pool us-east-2_9y6XyJnXC. DB: ops_amplehtml. Key files: src/lib/smart-recommendations.ts, scripts/sync-plans.js.

milestones.title: Speaker diarization UI
milestones.quickPrompt: The visit-ai route already returns diarized transcripts with speaker labels from Deepgram Nova-3. The UI currently shows the full transcript as a single block. Goal: render speaker turns with You:/Them: labels, color-coded by speaker. This is P3 — do not start until live-voice-streaming (P1) and fill-diagnosis-plans (P2) are done. Key files: src/app/ehr/components/TranscriptView.tsx (or equivalent), src/app/api/ai/visit-ai/route.ts. Recent changes (Jun 7): ASR vocab biasing (PRs #123-125), RDS TLS (PRs #120-121).

milestones.title: Apple Watch IMU for motor tasks
milestones.quickPrompt: Motor tasks T09 (Finger-Nose-Finger), T10 (Rapid Alternating Movements), T11 (Finger Tapping), T15 (Gait), T16 (TUG) currently use XR hand-tracking only. Apple Watch IMU would add accelerometer + gyroscope data for tremor quantification and gait analysis. Upload session hardening complete (PRs #57–62, Jun 10–11): soundex phonetic name key, MRN upsert fix, acoustic queue watchdog. T00/T16 clinical accuracy fixes shipped (PR #64, Jun 11): T00 no longer emits fake 0.95 quality; T16 trunk-yaw sway has physiologic sanity floor. Implementation path: (1) WatchConnectivity framework in Unity via iOS native plugin, (2) CoreMotion data streamed from Watch to headset during tasks, (3) data stored in SessionResult and uploaded. Passive-findings repeatability harness (PR #55) is ready for calibration work. Key files: `SDNE/Assets/_Project/Scripts/Tasks/`, `SDNE/Assets/_Project/Scripts/Data/SessionResult.cs`, `docs/SDNE_Core15_Screening_Specification.md`.

milestones.title: Deploy SDNE dashboard to Amplify
milestones.quickPrompt: The SDNE dashboard is a React + TypeScript + Material UI app in the `dashboard/` directory. It currently runs locally only. Goal: deploy to AWS Amplify so the clinical team can access session results without needing a local environment. Upload session hardening complete (PRs #57–62, Jun 10–11). T00/T16 accuracy fixes (PR #64). Steps: (1) add amplify.yml build config, (2) create Amplify app in sevaro-sandbox account, (3) connect to blondarb/SDNE repo main branch, (4) set env vars (API endpoint, Cognito pool). The dashboard currently hits the Lambda API at https://6ml4wgo1m4.execute-api.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/dev. Auth is not yet wired — add Cognito auth as part of this work. Key files: `dashboard/src/`, `dashboard/package.json`.

milestones.title: Steel-man test remediations
milestones.quickPrompt: Steel-man review findings are in qa/STEEL-MAN-*.md. Current in-progress remediations (as of Jun 10): (1) logging audit — remove any PII/transcript content from debug logs; (2) thread safety — AudioCaptureService and TranscriptCoordinator have shared mutable state accessed from background queues; (3) CRC32C integrity check on WAV writes — verify the checksum matches on readback; (4) dead code cleanup — several recording pipeline branches from pre-Meeting-Mode era are unreachable. Meeting capture reliability + quality overhaul shipped (Jun 18-19, PRs #14-18): ArchiveBody keeps full transcript+summary (not summary-only); transcription timeout + never-delete-audio-on-failure (audio preserved to FailedRecordings/); New returns to Just Me/Meeting chooser; on-device summary prompts rewritten (real names, no Speaker N placeholders); acoustic-bleed guard in DiarizationService.mergeChannels; clearer labels (Thoughts→Just Me) + smart silence auto-stop (5-min silence, 3-h hard cap). Previously shipped (Jun 10): record-while-transcribing + background jobs (mic immediately available after stop); interactive Archive (open/edit/AI-process any past transcript); on-device map-reduce summarization for 72-min+ transcripts; 72-min UI freeze fix (lazy chunking); virtual-meeting stops-early fix; Two-channel virtual meetings VERIFIED WORKING (Jun 9) — SystemAudioPermission TCC SPI, TranscriptWindow 760x680 review window, Full Transcript verbatim, orphaned temp files swept. Meeting Mode Phase 2b (Jun 8-9): fully-local FluidAudio (0.15.2, pyannote CoreML) for on-device diarization. To resume: read qa/STEEL-MAN-*.md for the full finding list, pick the next unresolved finding, fix it, run the test suite (`swift test`), update the steel-man doc with resolution notes.

milestones.title: Meeting mode — speaker naming + polish
milestones.quickPrompt: Meeting Mode Phase 2b shipped (Jun 8-9): on-device FluidAudio diarization (pyannote CoreML 0.15.2), word-level timestamps from AppleSpeechProvider, security audit remediation (logging, thread safety, CRC32C). Phase 3 polish targets: (1) AI speaker naming — map 'Speaker 1' → real names from introductions/context using FoundationModels on-device; (2) color-coded speakers in TranscriptWindow result view; (3) 'downloading speaker model…' first-run indicator when FluidAudio model downloads. The diarization model is bundled — no download needed on iOS 26. For macOS, the model downloads on first use. Meeting capture reliability + quality overhaul shipped (Jun 18-19, PRs #14-18): ArchiveBody keeps full transcript+summary, transcription timeout + never-delete-audio-on-failure, acoustic-bleed guard, smart silence auto-stop (5-min silence, 3-h hard cap). Previously shipped (Jun 10): record-while-transcribing, interactive Archive, map-reduce summarization, UI freeze fix, virtual-meeting stops-early fix. Spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-16-meeting-mode-design.md. Key files: VoiceTranscriber/Services/DiarizationService.swift, VoiceTranscriber/Views/TranscriptWindow.swift.

milestones.title: Submit iOS update to App Store
milestones.quickPrompt: The v1 iOS Neuro Plans app (in blondarb/neuro-plans repo) still hits Supabase PostgREST directly. The v2 website (this repo) has replaced Supabase with AWS RDS + Cognito. Migration steps: (1) update SupabaseService.swift in the iOS app to hit the v2 REST API base URL instead of Supabase; (2) replace .from('table').select() calls with GET /api/domains?specialty=neurology; (3) replace insert calls with POST /api/analytics/verify-email and POST /api/feedback/plan-request; (4) update the Cognito pool from deprecated us-east-2_Owfb1zpgM to the consolidated pool us-east-2_9y6XyJnXC. After code changes: archive and upload via Xcode, submit to App Store Connect. Sevaro brand chrome + cross-product navigation shipped (PRs #24-27, May 27). v2 website status: Active, verified Jun 24. Key files in neuro-plans iOS repo: ios/NeuroPlans/NeuroPlans/Services/SupabaseService.swift.

milestones.title: Sonali AI voice coaching integration
milestones.quickPrompt: Sonali is the VR rehabilitation coach. Current state: Sonali FBX model loaded at 200x scale beside the shelves, pre-baked URP materials (Skin, Hair) applied, positioned facing player. The FBX is a static mesh — no skeleton, no SkinnedMeshRenderer, so gaze tracking and lip sync cannot be wired yet. Sprint 2 shipped: performance metrics, Sonali Phase 1 integration (PR #2). Next steps: (1) get a rigged FBX with skeleton + blend shapes from the asset pipeline (see docs/ASSET_PIPELINE.md — use Meshy AI MCP for rigging), (2) wire TrackedPoseDriver for head gaze so Sonali looks at the player, (3) add lip sync via Amazon Polly Speech Marks + viseme blend shapes, (4) connect AWS Bedrock dialogue via the @sevaro/sonali-agent package. Polly must use us-east-1 (Kajal Neural). Bedrock uses us-east-2. Key files: MarketDayVR/Assets/_Project/Scripts/SonaliController.cs, docs/ASSET_PIPELINE.md.

milestones.title: Core Data migration from UserDefaults
milestones.quickPrompt: Workout history is currently stored in UserDefaults — fine for MVP but not scalable. Migrate to Core Data for persistent, queryable workout history. This is deferred until after App Store approval (v1.0.1 in review). Steps: (1) create a Core Data model with Workout and Exercise entities mirroring Models.swift, (2) write a migration utility that reads existing UserDefaults history and writes to Core Data, (3) update WorkoutDetailView and history views to fetch from Core Data instead of UserDefaults, (4) delete the UserDefaults history keys after successful migration. Key files: workout/Models.swift, workout/ContentView.swift. Do not start until App Store approval is confirmed.

milestones.title: Expand API endpoints

milestones.title: Create new specialty instance
milestones.quickPrompt: clinical-plans-template is the reusable template for specialty clinical apps (pulm-plans, nephro-plans, etc.). To create a new specialty: (1) clone this repo, (2) edit SpecialtyConfig.swift (app name, bundle ID, brand color, subscription ID), Category.swift, Reference.swift, CalculatorEngine.swift, (3) replace docs/plans/ content, (4) update landmark_pmids.json, (5) update validate_enriched_citations.py topic filter terms. Everything else (pipeline, scripts, CI, iOS shell, enrichment engine) works unchanged. Status: Maintenance. Key files: skills/neuro-builder-SKILL.md, scripts/pipeline.py.

milestones.title: Device build and provisioning
milestones.quickPrompt: Voxscribe is a universal voice transcription app (iPhone + iPad + Mac) built on Apple iOS 26 / macOS 26 native APIs. No cloud, no API keys. Tech: Swift 6, SpeechAnalyzer → DictationTranscriber (on-device), FoundationModels LanguageModelSession (on-device 3B). Three targets: Voxscribe (iOS), VoxscribeKeyboard (keyboard extension), VoxscribeMac (macOS menu bar). Build: XcodeGen (project.yml is source of truth). For device build: (1) register App Group (group.com.stevearbogast.voxscribe) and iCloud KVS container on developer.apple.com, (2) xcodegen generate, (3) xcodebuild -scheme Voxscribe -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -allowProvisioningUpdates build. Team ID: 92YUSSM83T. Simulator builds work without portal setup. Design doc: docs/plans/2025-07-17-voxscribe-design.md. Key principle: zero network calls, iOS 26 only, no @available guards.

milestones.title: Tier 3 alarm promotion
milestones.quickPrompt: Sevaro Ops monitors 55 deployed Lambdas. Tier 1 (user-facing): 1 error in 5min → alarm. Tier 2 (fetchers/processing): 3 errors in 15min → alarm. Tier 3 (utility): metric filter only, no alarm. As usage patterns emerge, some Tier 3 functions may warrant promotion to Tier 2 alarms. Check CloudWatch for any Tier 3 functions that have had error spikes. To promote: update the SERVICE_MAP in the error-responder Lambda and add a CloudWatch alarm via SAM template. Monitoring: 54 metric filters, 43 alarms. SAM stack: sevaro-ops-test-user-cleanup. Key files: lambda/error-responder/handler.js, template.yaml.

Currently admin access is controlled by ADMIN_EMAILS env var (default: steve@sevaro.com). The page should let current admins manage the list without requiring a redeployment. Options: (1) store admin list in DynamoDB alongside other hub data, (2) store in Cognito group membership. Auth: Cognito pool us-east-2_9y6XyJnXC, client 2ejoumofnhhd3133gv9e9i6r1h. Hub is Next.js 15 (App Router, SSR) on Amplify d3n3e9vr1knkam. SES in sandbox — only verified email recipients. Key files: src/app/feedback/page.tsx, src/app/api/feedback/, src/middleware.ts.

milestones.title: Voice-in-chat transcription
milestones.quickPrompt: The feedback widget chat mode already records audio and uploads to S3 (via signed URL from sevaro-feedback-api). Transcription is not yet wired. Goal: after audio upload, call Deepgram Nova-3 (or AWS Transcribe) to transcribe the clip and include the text in the chat message. Session ownership enforcement shipped (PR #20, Jun 10) — Lambda now stamps userId from verified JWT and enforces ownership on mutation routes. 115 tests, tsc clean. Multi-pool JWT support (PR #17) handles Evidence Engine + other pools. Options: (1) Deepgram REST API from Lambda (simpler, no streaming needed for short clips), (2) AWS Transcribe batch job (async, adds latency). Package: @sevaro/feedback (tsup, ESM+CJS+DTS). Lambda: sevaro-feedback-api. DynamoDB: sevaro-feedback-sessions. Key files: lambda/feedback-api/handlers/, src/components/FeedbackWidget.tsx.

milestones.title: Review Plans + Scales pills
milestones.quickPrompt: Two new review pills for the Scribe Chrome extension note step. 'Review my plan' validates the existing Plan section for evidence-based errors AND surfaces up to 3 candidate plans from data/plans.json (166 neuro plans snapshot). Each candidate expands inline into a PlanPreviewCard with basic/advanced toggle and per-line checkboxes — clinician picks individual lines to add. 'Suggest scales' surfaces entries from the neuro-plans-v2 scales catalog (28 enhanced scales in scales-enhanced.json — NIHSS, mRS, ABCD2, etc.) with a 'Score now' button that deep-links to neuroplans.app/scales/{id}?prefill=.... Phase 3 (deferred) adds Scales pill to chart-prep. Phase 5 (deferred) adds opt-in auto-trigger. Cross-repo prerequisites: (a) plans+scales sync workflow from neuro-plans-v2 → evidence-engine; (b) EnhancedScaleCalculatorProps accepts initialSelections + scales/[id]/page.tsx parses ?prefill= (Phase 2a in neuro-plans-v2, ~30 lines, backwards-compatible). Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-15-review-plans-scales-pills-design.md. Key files: chrome-extension/src/components/NoteStep.tsx, chrome-extension/src/components/PlanPreviewCard.tsx.

milestones.title: Provision OIDC role for Bedrock CI
milestones.quickPrompt: The CP3 anti-fabrication workflow in .github/workflows/ needs an AWS OIDC role to invoke Bedrock from GitHub Actions. Setup mirrors docs/CP1_BEDROCK_LOGGING_GUARD.md — create an OIDC provider for GitHub in IAM, create a role with Bedrock invoke permissions scoped to the repo, store the role ARN as AWS_BEDROCK_INVOKE_ROLE_ARN secret. Same pattern would unblock a CI Playwright workflow for the T3 staging harness (currently local-only). Key files: .github/workflows/, docs/CP1_BEDROCK_LOGGING_GUARD.md.

milestones.title: Session comparison (side-by-side diff)
milestones.quickPrompt: XR Test Companion (macOS SwiftUI, Deepgram streaming, ADB screenshots) stores sessions in ~/XRTestSessions/YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MM-SS/ with subdirs screenshots/, video/, logs/, metrics/. Recent reliability work: auto-retry malformed Bedrock JSON, 5-min analysis timeout, build-and-install.sh, canonical XRScreenCapture template. Goal: side-by-side diff view of two sessions — compare transcript, timeline events, performance metrics, and screenshots between runs. UI: split panel with session A on left, session B on right, shared timeline axis. Implementation: SessionExportService generates summary.md — start by parsing two summaries and diffing them. Key files: XRTestCompanion/Services/SessionExportService.swift, XRTestCompanion/Views/SessionListView.swift.

milestones.title: Consolidate Lambda functions
milestones.quickPrompt: sevaro-aws-lambda is the central SAM repo for shared Sevaro Lambda infrastructure. Current functions: cognito-presignup (restricts registration to @sevaro.com, now allows AdminCreateUser bypass), regenerate-section (single SOAP section regen for Scribe), scribe-api (initial Scribe Lambda API). Bedrock guardrail integration (PR #2) added guardrail 04it57nlb3ac v5. Prompt caching (PR #1). Goal: evaluate whether Lambda functions from other repos (monitor functions from github-showcase, evidence engine fetcher watchdog) should be consolidated here. Check if moving them would reduce duplication. Key files: template.yaml, lambda/cognito-presignup/, lambda/regenerate-section/.

milestones.title: Expand to additional specialties
milestones.quickPrompt: The Sevaro Plan Pipeline is a Step Functions state machine that generates, verifies, and imports clinical decision support plans. Currently configured for pulmonary/critical care (135 diagnoses, 12 categories in data/diagnoses.json). To expand to a new specialty: (1) create a new diagnoses JSON file (follow the existing schema), (2) set DATABASE_NAME env var to the new specialty's RDS database, (3) update the SNS topic and S3 bucket prefix, (4) run sam deploy with the new env vars, (5) use run_batch.py with the new diagnoses file. The GenerateTools Lambda can produce scales.json and tools.json alongside plans (--generate-tools flag). Shared library in functions/shared/ handles Bedrock, RxNorm, OpenFDA, ICD-10, PubMed. Key files: data/diagnoses.json, functions/shared/, scripts/run_batch.py.

milestones.title: Expand Sonali capabilities
milestones.quickPrompt: @sevaro/sonali-agent is a local npm React component library + server utilities for Sonali, the Sevaro AI coach. Client exports: React components, hooks, types. Server exports: Bedrock + Polly handlers for Next.js API routes. Prompt caching added (PR #2). Polly must use us-east-1 (Kajal Neural). Bedrock uses us-east-2. Inline styles only (no Tailwind). Persona rules: warm American woman of Indian heritage, never diagnose/treat/cure/prevent, outputs are 'descriptive performance signals'. Emotion states: Neutral, Warm, Encouraging, Celebratory, Concerned, Calm, Thinking, Playful. To expand: consider adding new emotion animations, a memory/context system for multi-session continuity, or integration with HealthKit data for more personalized coaching. Key files: src/components/SonaliWidget.tsx, src/server/bedrock-handler.ts.

milestones.title: Advanced report template sharing
milestones.quickPrompt: EEG Reporter (eeg.neuroplans.app) has per-neurologist preferences stored in localStorage. Report templates are in src/data/sentence-library.ts (170+ pre-built sentences). Goal: allow neurologists to share custom templates across the team — e.g., a custom attestation template created by one neurologist becomes available to others. Options: (1) store templates in DynamoDB keyed by Cognito sub, (2) use a shared table with team-scoped access, (3) export/import via JSON. Custom Sections feature shipped (PRs #22-23): inline custom sections at 5 anchor points, localStorage library, Word .docx export. Feedback JWT auth migrated (PR #25). Auth: Cognito pool us-east-2_Owfb1zpgM. Key files: src/data/sentence-library.ts, src/lib/preferences.ts, src/stores/eeg-store.ts.

milestones.title: App Store submission
milestones.quickPrompt: SnapText is a macOS menu bar text expansion and snippet manager. Tech: Swift/SwiftUI, SwiftData (Folder, Snippet, AppSettings), SPM. Build: swift build or build-app.sh for .app bundle. Features shipped: global keyboard monitor, quick search palette with glassmorphism UI, clipboard monitoring, rich text editor (HTML storage), JSON import/export, onboarding. Status: New. Before App Store submission: (1) test text expansion reliability across different apps (TextEdit, browsers, email clients), (2) verify global keyboard monitor permissions flow (Accessibility), (3) add privacy policy, (4) prepare screenshots and App Store metadata. Key files: Sources/SnapText/TextExpansionEngine.swift, Sources/SnapText/QuickSearchPalette.swift.

milestones.title: Home comparison feature refinement
milestones.quickPrompt: Personal tools site (Vercel, static HTML/JS) has a home evaluation tool (home-eval.html) with Supabase data and side-by-side comparison view, plus a rental calculator. Supabase integration is legacy per workspace migration strategy. Refinement options: (1) improve the comparison UI with better diff highlighting, (2) add mortgage calculator integration, (3) add neighborhood scoring. CDN: jsdelivr (not unpkg). No auth — personal and unlisted. Key files: home-eval.html, rental-calculator.html. Note: Supabase key in .env.local and Vercel env vars — never commit.

milestones.title: Archive Prisma scaffolding cleanup
milestones.quickPrompt: Patient Health Platform is legacy/reference only (superseded by synapse-teleencounter). Status: Legacy. The Prisma scaffolding (prisma/ + dev.db) is vestigial from the pre-static-JSON era and should be removed. Also: stale root-level docs (AI_GENERATION_SUCCESS.md, APP_ICON_COMPLETE.md) should be archived. Do not re-introduce Prisma/Supabase — the migration to static JSON was deliberate. Bedrock calls hit us-east-2 with profile sevaro-sandbox. No auth, no PHI, demo only. CLAUDE.md improvements shipped (PR #2, May 1). Key files: prisma/, src/data/demo-patients.json.

milestones.title: Feature development
milestones.quickPrompt: TeleShift Tracker is a TypeScript/React app with Tailwind CSS. Build: npm run dev (development), npm run build, npm run lint, npm run preview. Uses @/ path alias. Component composition pattern. Global state via React Context. Custom hooks with 'use' prefix. Event handlers with 'handle' prefix. PascalCase for components/interfaces/types, camelCase for variables/functions/hooks. To develop new features: read existing components in src/ first, follow the established patterns, use the ui/ directory for shared UI components.

milestones.title: Quarterly guideline review
milestones.quickPrompt: Cardio Plans iOS app (v1.0, READY_FOR_SALE on App Store). Status: Maintenance. Monthly guideline freshness check: python3 scripts/check_guideline_freshness.py --cache. Actions: 'newer_available' → update plan references immediately; 'aging' (≥8yr) → check society website manually; 'review_recommended' (≥5yr) → verify content. After updating plans: python3 scripts/pipeline.py (full pipeline: landmark matching, PubMed verify, ICD-10 validate, JSON gen, enrichment, iOS bundle copy, Xcode build). CI parity check set to continue-on-error (environment difference). Legal pages served from neuro-plans repo. Known issue: CI parity check fails in CI (passes locally). Key files: scripts/pipeline.py, docs/plans/index.md, docs/data/plans.json.

milestones.title: Monthly guideline freshness check
milestones.quickPrompt: Run monthly (1st of month): python3 scripts/check_guideline_freshness.py --cache. See docs/GUIDELINE_MAINTENANCE.md for full process. Key actions: 'newer_available' → update plan references and content immediately (Steps 1-3 in maintenance doc); 'aging' (≥8yr) → check society website manually; 'review_recommended' (≥5yr) → verify content still reflects current practice. After updating plan files: regenerate JSON (python3 scripts/generate_json.py --all --merge), copy to iOS bundle (pipeline step 9), verify parity. Citation enrichment target: 80%+ of evidence citations linked to PubMed. Quality target: 90%+ checker score (54/60). Key files: scripts/check_guideline_freshness.py, docs/GUIDELINE_MAINTENANCE.md, docs/data/freshness-report.md.

milestones.title: Refresh design tokens from Figma
milestones.quickPrompt: Sevaro Design System tokens live in DESIGN_SYSTEM.md. Figma file key: 2SvpMV4WE5CFjxvsxTRg1w. Key pages: Colour=177:654, Grid=177:675, Icon=177:679. To refresh: (1) use mcp__Figma__get_design_context against file key 2SvpMV4WE5CFjxvsxTRg1w, (2) pull Colour/Grid/Icon page nodes, (3) overwrite DESIGN_SYSTEM.md token sections in place (keep headings stable — linked by name from ~15 other repos), (4) commit with message 'tokens: <what changed>'. Before releasing a token change, grep for consumers: grep -r 'sevaro-design-system' ~/dev/repos --include='CLAUDE.md'. Currently referenced by: sevaro-hub, github-showcase, Workouts, SevaroMonitor, SevaroNeuro-scribe-chrome, sevaro-scribe, sevaro-eeg-reporter, synapse-teleencounter, sdne-dashboard, sevaro-evidence-engine. Do NOT add npm/package.json — keep this repo buildless.
